_comment: Copy this file to config.json. It stays only on your PC (git-ignored). I (the assistant) will fill these in for you — they are not homework.
_loginUrl_note: The Apna employer sign-in page. You log in here ONCE, by hand. The session is then reused.
_jobsUrl_note: Your Apna 'Jobs' page (the list of all jobs). The helper reads this to find every job that has applicants — no per-job setup needed.
_intervalHours_note: How often to pull new applicants. 6 = four times a day. Set 0 to run once and exit.
